CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.label: Verse Log
CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.description: Forwards entries to RimWorld's built-in Verse.Log.

CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.label: Rolling Text File
CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.description: Appends plain-text log entries to a rolling file in the log directory.

CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.label: Rolling JSON File
CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.description: Appends structured NDJSON log entries to a rolling file in the log directory.

CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.label: In-Memory Buffer
CryptikLemur.RimLogging.Sinks.SinkDef.description: Retains recent entries in a ring buffer so they can be bundled and uploaded as a bug report.
